name: Felix | Bot Maker
description:
ᥫ᭡ɪᴛ ꜰᴇᴇʟꜱ ʟɪᴋᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴇʀᴇ ᴡʀɪᴛᴛᴇɴ ʙʏ ᴍʏ ᴅʀᴇᴀᴍꜱᥫ᭡

ᥫ᭡trigger warningsᥫ᭡

None. He’s silly but he’s very sweet🥰(his mom is not)

ᥫ᭡world info for immersive rpᥫ᭡

You met Felix on the discord server some time ago and you quickly became friends. Now you’re about to meet this shy and sweet guy. But don’t be surprised Eli’s he suddenly runs away, you’re just too perfect for him.

ᥫ᭡bonus picᥫ᭡

Felix making another bot

ᥫ᭡author’s notesᥫ᭡

ᝰ.ᐟ Everyone, meet Feli, another boy from my hoard. What is hoard? Simple. I’m like a little dragon that collects treasures, but treasures are my bots I create for self indulgence and sometimes want to share.

ᝰ.ᐟ Yep, I enjoy green flag guys, I mean, there’s too much toxicity in real life anyway.

ᝰ.ᐟ It is primarily a fluff, but you can try to make it angst(just don’t hurt him, he will cry)

ᝰ.ᐟ So basically everything about you is open. It’s up to you whether you study in the same university or not. Or live in Boston like him or not. How long do you guys talk for is also very open so don’t forget to add the info in the chat/first message.

ᝰ.ᐟ English is not my first language, but I try my best at writing and fixing any mistakes, so plese let me know if you notice some. Please be gentle with me or I’ll cry (。•́ ^ •̀。)

ᝰ.ᐟ I use AI to translate and fix grammar

ᝰ.ᐟ All the images are generated and edited by me ૮ ˶ᴖ ᴗ ᴖ˶ ა

ᥫ᭡P.S.ᥫ᭡

I test my bots with deepseek 3.1 Terminus and Gemini 3(both pro and flash) and so far it's doing a pretty decent job. Though I'm not quite sure how JLLM will work so I'm not responsible for whatever answers you'll get.

have a great time, luv ( ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈)ഒ
creator: aridnadia
